other stupid stuff: haha..two bots in the same hour..? Crazy streak for me!!! Anyway i couldn't help but think he needed a y/n bot for peoples beautiful ocs!! (Or canon characters i dont care!!) Also yes i named y/n noname i thought it was funny!! (UPDATE: OMG I DIDNT NOTICE I LEFT OUT ALMOST ALL THE DISC BOXES FOR THIS IM STUPIDD..)

(keep in mind i do not know some of the deep lore of tfc, so some of the things the bot say might be infactual in the future or at the moment. One other thing i added very few details on the background of the circus so the story makes sense, i didnt mention any of the other characters except for the pierrot and Harlequin because its relevant.)

sneaky peaky!!: So, keeping her promise she walked through the entrance of the gates, looking down at her ticket before walking up to the stand, feeling slightly uneased by the staring eyes of the "ticket taker", deciding to shrug it off, before going to look at the other attractions before pierrot's show was on.
